title: Tao Te Ching 61
source: Mawangdui silk manuscripts; Guodian bamboo slips
description: Chapter 61 of the Tao Te Ching by Laozi.
introduction: Chapter 61 of the Tao Te Ching by Laozi.

translation.text: A great state is the lower course of a river, the meeting point of the world, the female of the world.
